title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.1175 - Jurat certificate form — signature form
text:
486.1175.  Jurat certificate form — signature form. — 1.  A remote online notary shall use a jurat certificate in substantially the following form in notarizing a signature or mark on an affidavit or other sworn or affirmed written declaration:
  2.  A remote online notary shall use a certificate in substantially the following form in notarizing the signature or mark of any person acknowledging on his or her own behalf or as a partner, corporate officer, attorney in fact, or in any other representative capacity who appears remotely:
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
